text: Being here, I am struck by the silence and sterility of the space. The clean lines and clear glass grant a certain transparency, as if all intentions are laid bare, though nothing is truly revealed. Stepping into the R+D exhibition evokes a sense of curiosity. This is a temple to innovation and the unknown, a place where human imagination seeks to unfold itself. I feel invigorated, slightly awed by the sheer ambition of human inquiry. Yet, I am also reminded of the infinite gulf between idea and understanding—an unbridgeable distance that both troubles and excites me.
